name: DundeeWealth Inc.
description: DundeeWealth Inc. was a Canadian wealth management company that provided investment management, financial planning, and advisory services to retail and institutional clients. The company managed and administered mutual funds, closed-end funds, and alternative investment products, primarily under the Dynamic Funds brand. In 2011, DundeeWealth was acquired by the Bank of Nova Scotia (Scotiabank) and subsequently integrated into Scotiabank's wealth management division.
